description: Ian Quinn receives a call from Coulson warning him that S.H.I.E.L.D. will shoot down his aircraft if he enters allied airspace. Quinn relays a cryptic message from the Clairvoyant. The scene solidifies the ongoing antagonism and sets up future conflict.

transcript.line: Seth, I've gotta say... you have exceeded my expectations.
Agent Phil Coulson with S.H.I.E.L.D. We've never actually met, but I'm familiar with your work... all of it.
So, this is a “getting to know you” call?
No, just a message that the first time your aircraft drifts over any country allied with S.H.I.E.L.D., we will shoot you out of the sky.
So this is a courtesy call. Well, thank you, Agent Coulson. And I have a message for you. The Clairvoyant told me to say hello.
